name: Bag of Devouring
overview: This bag resembles a Bag of Holding but is a feeding orifice for a gigantic extradimensional creature. Turning the bag inside out closes the orifice.

properties.creature_sense: The extradimensional creature attached to the bag can sense whatever is placed inside the bag.
properties.organic_material: Animal or vegetable matter placed wholly in the bag is devoured and lost forever.

living_creature_insertion.description: When part of a living creature is placed in the bag, as happens when someone reaches inside it, there is a 50 percent chance that the creature is pulled inside the bag.

creature_extraction.description: Another creature can take an action to reach into the bag to pull a creature out.
creature_extraction.risk: The puller isn't pulled inside the bag first

properties.creature_devoured: Any creature that starts its turn inside the bag is devoured, its body destroyed.

inanimate_storage.daily_event: Once each day, the bag swallows any objects inside it and spits them out into another plane of existence. The DM determines the time and plane.

destruction: If the bag is pierced or torn, it is destroyed, and anything contained within it is transported to a random location on the Astral Plane.
